entry.title: My First Pull Request
entry.summary:
I use Pelican and the pelican-bootstrap3 theme to built this site.

I made my first real pull request today in the form of a minor contribution to pelican-bootstrap3. I added a feature that allows you to add a series of images to the sidebar. The original intent was to allow me to add certification marks to my sidebar, which you can now see in action right here!

Props to @DandyDev for the pro tips.

entry.title: AWS SysOps Administration - Associate
entry.summary: Last week I took the AWS SysOps Administrator - Associate test and passed with flying colours. Next step will be the Developer and then the DevOps certifications, both of which I hope to complete this year. I look forward to doing a lot more work in AWS in the future.

entry.title: The First Post
entry.summary: I am absolutely terrible at this blog business, but I’m giving it another whirl. This is intended to be some sort of work / professional experience related info site. I suppose it is really meant to be what would be called a “brag sheet”.
